title: astragalus commodus
intro: Astragalus commodus, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial plant native to China, characterized by its white or pink flowers and small seed pods. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. Astragalus commodus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and preventing respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
